goal: 修复 Codex hooks feature flag 迁移到 hooks

summary.title: 迁移 Codex hooks feature flag
summary.what: 将 Codex hook 安装器写入的 feature flag 从 deprecated 的 codex_hooks 改为 hooks，并让安装器在遇到旧 codex_hooks 配置时迁移到 hooks。安装状态检查现在识别 hooks=true，同时把残留 codex_hooks 标为需要修复。
summary.why: Codex CLI 已弃用 [features].codex_hooks，继续写旧 key 会在启动时产生 deprecation warning，并可能误导用户以为 Mainline hook 配置仍需要旧开关。
summary.user_goal: 修复 Codex hooks feature flag 迁移到 hooks

decisions.point: Codex hook feature flag 的 source of truth
decisions.chose: 只写入 [features].hooks = true，并在安装时删除 legacy codex_hooks 行。
decisions.rationale: 新 Codex CLI 将 hooks 作为稳定 feature flag；删除旧 key 可以避免 deprecation warning，而不是只追加新 key。
rejected: 同时保留 codex_hooks 和 hooks，因为这会继续触发旧 key 警告。

decisions.point: legacy 配置如何暴露给用户
decisions.chose: InstallationStatus 将 legacy codex_hooks 视为 repair reason，重新运行 install 会修复。
decisions.rationale: 这样 status 可以解释为什么已安装 hook 仍需要 repair，并保持修复入口统一。

review_notes: 验证：go test ./internal/hooks/agents/codex；go test ./internal/hooks/... ./internal/cli；git diff --check。另已把本机 ~/.codex/config.toml 中的 codex_hooks 迁移为 hooks，并保留 timestamp backup。

architectural_claims: Codex agent integration remains repo-local via .codex/hooks.json and .codex/config.toml.
Hook dispatcher behavior is unchanged; only Codex feature flag enablement and repair detection changed.
behavioral_changes: New Codex hook installs create [features].hooks = true instead of [features].codex_hooks = true.
Existing repo-local Codex config containing codex_hooks is migrated by install to hooks and the legacy key is removed.
Codex hook installation status reports missing or disabled hooks feature and legacy codex_hooks separately.
migration_notes: Users with existing .codex/config.toml containing codex_hooks should rerun mainline hooks install --agent codex to rewrite it to hooks.
Users with global ~/.codex/config.toml containing codex_hooks should replace that key with hooks manually or through their config management.
